model_route_profile.selection_reason: low-cost structured comparison over sanitized digest; no frontier council needed because this is a formatting and consistency comparison, not a final architecture/payment/public-claim verdict

task.instruction: Create a concise comparison PRD packet from the sanitized E1.2.8 context. Preserve source boundaries. Do not invent customer validation, ROI, provider readiness, Railway readiness, Telegram delivery, or Notion writeback. Separate FACT, INTERPRETATION, HYPOTHESIS, and GAP. Return Markdown only.
expected_sections: PRD Delta Versus Local Codex Run

sanitized_context.e1_summary: E1 proves ArchFlow on itself as a governed PRD automation service. It turns approved product-team material into source inventory, context digest, PRD, task matrix, acceptance criteria, backlog, decision log, review report, knowledge-base update, PDF output, and handoff.
sanitized_context.service_direction: AI-native PRD automation for B2B SaaS product teams, usually Series B-D, 50-500 employees, with 2-5 PMs, where Director or VP Product owns PRD quality, discovery-to-delivery speed, and cross-functional alignment.
method_sequence: exclude private raw source from public/provider payloads
generate PRD packet from digest, method, ICP, and architecture
extract tasks, acceptance criteria, risks, missing questions, and review gates
run AF Review before claims, writeback, provider calls, or external sends
save reviewed outputs as run artifacts, PDFs, task updates, and handoffs
current_output_package: dashboard/Jarvis Architecture 1 and Architecture 2 local control surface

blocked_or_gated: external provider comparison until sanitized payload and ledger pass
Notion writeback until connector or approved API path succeeds
